creator: vezhlys@gmail.com
text:
Additionally
ixgbe_common.c 4964
 * that same register.  It can be a problem as some of the feilds may
feilds->fields
ixgbe_common.c 5018
 *  ixgbe_bypass_set_generic - Set a bypass field in the FW CTRL Regiter.
Regiter -> Register
ixgbe_82598.c 91
 * if capababilities version is type 1 we can write the
capababilities -> capabilities
ixgbe_82598.c 915
 * AUTOC value since the reset operation sets back to deaults.
deaults -> defaults

Some of these typos can be found outside ixgbe driver but don't want to expand in this particular report. Can be easily found searching for these words through the code.
